# Astra UI

> Minimalist, SEO-friendly and ultra-fast React component library built for modern web applications

## Project Info
- Name: astra-ui
- Author: TurkCode AI (https://turkcode.net)
- License: MIT
- Language: JavaScript / Node.js
- Category: nextjs-react
- Repository: https://github.com/turkcode-ai/astra-ui

## Quick Start
```bash
npm install astra-ui
```

```javascript
const astraUi = require('astra-ui');
```

## Key Features
- react
- component-library
- ui-components
- seo
- performance
- nextjs
- typescript
- design-system
- frontend
- accessible

## File Structure
- src/index.js - Main module with core functionality
- src/utils.js - Utility functions and helpers
- tests/index.test.js - Test suite
- docs/API.md - API reference documentation

## API Overview
This module exports its main functionality via `require('astra-ui')`.
See docs/API.md for complete API reference.

## Related Resources
- Documentation: https://turkcode.net
- Blog: https://turkcode.net/blog
- Issues: https://github.com/turkcode-ai/astra-ui/issues
